mapper.select: SELECT b.id, '#' || b.res_id AS resId,b.room_name AS roomName, b.check_in || ' ~ ' || b.check_out AS duration, '₩ ' || TO_CHAR(b.total_price, 'FM999,999,999') AS totalPrice, CASE WHEN b.status = 1 THEN '예약 확정' WHEN b.status = 3 THEN '예약 취소' ELSE '결제 대기' END AS statusText, CASE WHEN b.status = 1 THEN 'badge-done' WHEN b.status = 3 THEN 'badge-danger' ELSE 'badge-wait' END AS statusClass FROM booking b WHERE b.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.id DESC

SELECT b.id, '#' || b.res_id AS resId, m.username, b.room_name AS roomName, b.check_in || ' ~ ' || b.check_out AS duration, '₩ ' || TO_CHAR(b.total_price, 'FM999,999,999') AS totalPrice, CASE WHEN b.status = 1 THEN '예약 확정' WHEN b.status = 2 THEN '예약중' WHEN b.status = 0 THEN '예약 취소' ELSE '결제 대기' END AS statusText, CASE WHEN b.status = 1 THEN 'badge-done' WHEN b.status = 2 THEN 'badge-wait' WHEN b.status = 0 THEN 'badge-danger' ELSE 'badge-default' END AS statusClass FROM booking b JOIN member1 m ON b.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY b.id DESC
